headline: MSCI and UBS Announce Strategic Partnership to Bring Greater Transparency to Private Markets
summary: NEW YORK, July 09, 2026--MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI) and UBS Group AG are announcing a strategic partnership aimed at advancing transparency across private markets.
